response.original_title: The Rites Of The Demons Of Westport
response.overview: The Rites Of The Demons Of Westport is a Thriller/Horror story based off the Wattpad Webstory by PRNCSPLM also known as Chase Pulumbarit, adapted by Aliah Dela Cruz.
response.tagline: Run all you want. You cant hide from ME.
response.title: The Rites Of The Demons Of Westport
